text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the conflict between Tamamo Cross and Oguri
Cap glows white-hot...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ahem, aren't you forgetting somebody?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Go, Creek, gooo! Dat's da way! Hit 'em where it
hurts!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is in the lead. And she's holding onto
it. The Kikuka Sho is herrrrs!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Despite being a last-minute replacement for a
withdrawal, Super Creek has slid right to victory
in the final G1 race of the Classics! What an
unbelievable win!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for keeping all my sweet little fans
waiting. I know I took a little longer than Oguri to
bloom, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Next up, I'll be heading to the Arima Kinen.
Tamtam, Oguri, I'd love to join you both there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek, you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way back from the racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So, Oguri, how've things been lately?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Lately? Well...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've been very hungry. Very.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, that's always the case with you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The bigger the race, the more energy I need.
That's what gets my hunger going.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And now that Creek's going to be joining us, I
feel an even more intense hunger... I could really
go for Toki's meat and potato stew or some of
Ine's beef sinew skewers...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's go and grab something to eat.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hold up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap saunters off into the labyrinth that is
Kyoto's famed food district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One evening a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dammit... Not again...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, not like this is totally outta left field for
me, but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a plate of uneaten food in front of her,
Tamamo Cross grits her teeth.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...I'm strugglin' to eat again. See, lately...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross explains that slowly over time, the
portions we worked so hard to increase have
shrunk down again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I'm not entirely surprised.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And the box lunch I ate before today's race was
extra tasty. Maybe that played a part too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's what she said after the autumn Tenno Sho.
If I read between the lines...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must not usually find meals to be especially
tasty. And if she's falling back into those old
habits again...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri and I sure are opposites. She's eating just
fine—hell, she's eaten more than ever before.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's the difference between us... The tougher
the race, the more she eats, but my appetite only
dies down as the stakes get higher.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: If this keeps up, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The less she eats, the greater our disadvantage
will be. That said...
choice_data_list:
This also proves that you're shaping up for the
challenge.

This also proves that you're shaping up for the
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Shapin' up? If anythin', things are goin' downhill, dont'cha think?
choice_data_list:
Your body's starting to prepare itself for the
important race to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The current situation's different from when her
body was underdeveloped. Tamamo Cross's
hunger is the source of her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The more crucial a race is, the more intensely her
body hungers for the win. In a sense, this is an
inevitable change.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So my body's preppin' itself before it leaps into
the fray... Still...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If Oguri keeps chowin' down, she'll just get
stronger 'n stronger...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I can't do that. The more I try 'n bulk up, the
worse things get...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's no light at the end of this tunnel. And I
know that on account of how well I know Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm not winnin' this race... No doubt about it, she's
gonna get better 'n better, and I'll be left in the
dust.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But there's gotta be some way outta this, right? Some way I can get ahead of Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fighting fire with fire—or food with food in Oguri's case—probably won't do us any good. That's her strategy, not ours. Which means...
choice_data_list:
Our only choice is to work on that hunger of
yours.

Our only choice is to work on that hunger of
yours.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: My hunger... Yeah, I got a real hunger in me. That's my strength. And it's the one area Oguri hasn't got me beat.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So I just gotta hold my own and keep on
sharpenin' my skills till the race. But how...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes quiet as she becomes lost in thought.
The silence continues until...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: DAT'S IT!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Think 'bout it... Don'tcha think I've got it pretty
good right now? A little too good?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When times are good, I go on defense. I wanna
protect what I have from the bad times. But what
if there's nothing to defend?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's it. There's no other way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross's eyes glimmer subtly, as if to
suggest she's made up her mind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm White Lightning. But ya know, the
thing about lightnin' is...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It only flashes bright for a sec, right? It vanishes
after that. So...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Me runnin' like Oguri—pacin' myself and savin' my
energy for the long haul—is kinda nuts, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No way am I gonna win coppin' someone else's
style.
choice_data_list: For the long haul? You don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I don't needa think about my racing career. In fact, if I do, I lose my edge. Only way I can stay sharp is by not thinkin' about what's up ahead.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just needa focus on the moment. I've got one,
maybe two more races with Oguri in me. And for
those races...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanna see what happens when I put it all on the line. My resolve, my racing career—everything.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I do that, I think I can do it. I can become the
fastest, strongest White Lightning I can
be—someone who can fly past Oguri in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I've never had nothin' to my name. And if I can't
get this one thing I want most, right when I'm
finally ready to treat myself, well... that'd be one
lousy joke.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So I'm tossin' everythin' else aside 'n stakin' my
whole life on what happens this winter! 'Cause if
we do that, then maybe, just maybe...
choice_data_list:
Betting everything on this race could mean
retiring after. Are you prepared for that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You bet I am. Dad said he don't mind me quittin'
once I've done all I can.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta know when to call it quits, y'know. And
for me, it's this year's Arima Kinen. Till then, I'll
do what I gotta do, but after that, it's family time
for me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How's that sound? It'll be the end of my time with
you, too... but are ya still willin' to go for the win
with me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When people look back on this time in the future,
I want them all to say the same thing. "Tamamo
Cross was stronger than Oguri Cap."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And there's somethin' else I wanna believe too. I wanna believe that my life as a runner was the best because it ended too soon!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer... That's the peak I got my sights on.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So what if it kills me? I just don't want any regrets!
So please, I'm beggin' ya, help me reach my peak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's just no way... I can possibly refuse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is ready to stake her entire
existence on the coming season. All I can say is...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I owe ya big time, Trainer! All right, let's make
beatin' her our goal 'n really go for it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That win is all I need. Nothin' more, nothin' less.
And I'm gonna get that win, even if it's the last
thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I put Tamamo Cross on an intense
training schedule.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It's still not enough—I need more! More power... More hunger!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I want it... I'll do anythin' for it... For the power to
go past her—to overtake her!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, wheeze... How many days... How many days till our next race?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, I can keep going! I needa squeeze every
second of training I can before the big
smackdown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is desperate to improve, and I'm
desperately trying to keep her in check... We'll
keep pushing though, right up to the breaking
point, to surge even further ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The searing glow of White Lightning grows
brighter by the day—a light that shines with
Tamamo Cross's very lifeforce.
